power.method: High PoE (IEEE 802.3bt) / DC 36V; 42 W (PoE, heater and IR on)

features: zoom lens: 33x optical zoom, 16x digital zoom
smart dual light: IR 250m + white LED 100m

built-in analytics: Smart Intrusion Protection (People Line Crossing Detection, People Intrusion Detection, People Enter Area Detection, People Exit Area Detection, Vehicle Line Crossing Detection, Vehicle Intrusion Detection, ...
detection range: detection: 3060m, observation: 1214.3m, recognition: 612m, identification: 306m
ONVIF Compliant: Profile S, Profile G, Profile T, Profile M

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. RTSP port is 7070 by default.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'ACTi' profile. Default RTSP port is 7070.
